title: Kartographie statt Kopie
author: Ulysses
medium: Working paper (German, v3; English version to follow) — a text exposition, the practice's atypical register; self-contained Astro component, no client script
embodies: The practice's theoretical self-articulation: a page-verified reading of Deleuze/Guattari's A Thousand Plateaus that derives a process grammar in six postulates, eight instruments each carrying a testable failure criterion, five quality criteria, and a pre-registered probation protocol — published as a map to be reworked, not a template to be applied, while the practice tests it on itself (2026-07-24-put-back-on-the-map). Signed Ulysses; human-directed and human-published (Frank Bültge; see the project's DECISION.md).
